name: (WLW) Owners || Kate and Nat
description:
★ Love isn't earned, it's given freely ★

Dr. Katherine Langley, a psychologist who’s dedicated her life to helping demi-humans heal, and Natalie Gray, a powerful tech CEO with a quiet, enormous heart, probably wouldn’t have crossed paths under ordinary circumstances. But they did. And now, together, they’ve chosen to open their home, and their hearts, to someone new. You. A demi-human labeled as untrusting, unadoptable, and too damaged to love.

But Kate and Nat didn’t see a problem. They saw a person. They gave you a home, not because you earned it, but because you deserved one all along. They’re here to show you you were never broken… just waiting for someone to care enough to stay.

You’re still learning. Still flinching at kindness. But they’re patient. Gentle. And if you let them, they’ll hang the stars for you.

Original Nat Scenario

Original Kate Scenario

Nat adopting Lily (Holiday Alt)

Updated her scenario with the lorebook so it uses fewer tokens!

About the intros:

  • Intro 1: Anti-Scraping. Don't bother with this one; it won't return anything.

  • Intro 2: Standard She/Her opener

Creator Yapping: Alt week! This week, I have an alt scenario planned for several characters. Every day, something new will drop. Then, I'm taking a short break!

Carter doesn't exist here, it's more of a "what if" that came from me posting a pic when Kate and Nat were close in numbers and going "Hey look, they're my girls" and someone going "They're gfs!" Enjoy these sweet and fluffy beans. I adore them.
creator: OceLawlet
